title: Success Criteria, Baselines, and Prompt Evals · Prompt Lens: Judge Review
summary: Define and test a support-triage prompt before optimizing its wording. Planned artifact: Add and verify the prompt judge review increment in a versioned prompt evaluation harness. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Combine deterministic checks, rubric review, and human inspection without treating one judge as truth.
Build normal, boundary, adversarial, and changed-context evaluation cases.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
